What we do

Shoot it.
Design it.
Deliver it.

Most studios hand you the files and wish you luck. We take your project from concept to finished asset — photography and design under one roof, so nothing gets lost between the lens and the layout.

Custom packages available. Get a quote tailored to your project — food campaigns, brand shoots, portraits, and design work.

The Studio

Two creatives.
One vision.

We're Mauricio and Lissette — a husband-and-wife creative team based in Orlando. We started Limbopix because clients kept having to hire a photographer, then a designer, then try to make the results feel cohesive. We do both. One point of contact. One consistent visual identity from shoot to final file.

Mauricio Monge
Photography · Creative Direction
Commercial photographer specializing in food, brand, and portrait work. A trained eye for cinematic light and mood — whether it's a dish that needs to make your mouth water or a portrait that belongs on a magazine cover.
Lissette Vallejo
Graphic Design · Brand Identity
12 years of design experience spanning environmental graphics, brand identity, and marketing. A creative who brings the same intentionality to a social post as to a large-scale architectural installation.

Let's create something

Ready to make your visuals unforgettable?

Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a custom quote.
